description: Create a TypeScript module 'lruCache.ts' at the repo root exporting a generic 'LRUCache<K, V>' class. The constructor takes a positive integer capacity and throws on zero or negative. Methods: 'get(key: K): V | undefined' (returns the value and refreshes recency on hit), 'set(key: K, value: V): void' (inserts or updates and makes the key most-recently-used; evicts the LRU entry if size would exceed capacity), 'has(key: K): boolean' (read-only — does NOT refresh recency), 'size' getter (current entry count), 'capacity' getter (constructor value). Tests in tests/lruCache.test.ts must pass.
